title: Vibrant Crisp American Chicken Skewers
description: A paleo-friendly American dish featuring garlic sauce and a bain-marie cooking method, perfect for a healthy and flavorful meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together garlic sauce, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a wooden board lined with parchment paper.
Create a bain-marie by placing the wooden board over a large pan of simmering water.
Cover the pan with aluminum foil and cook for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue cooking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and crispy.
